One Hub for Every Coding Agent

Share prompt templates, workflow hooks, and plugins across Cursor, Claude Code, Codex & Copilot. Stop reinventing the wheel.

Prompt Template Library

Browse and import system prompts across Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, and Copilot with one click.

Workflow Hook Configurator

Set up pre-commit reviews, post-deploy notifications, and custom hooks with a visual editor.

Plugin Marketplace

Upload, review, and publish plugins. Monetize your agent integrations through the marketplace.

Conventional Commits Enforcer

v2.1.0
Git

Pre-commit hook that validates commit messages against the Conventional Commits spec. Blocks non-compliant commits and suggests corrections with AI assistance.

Auto-Docs Generator

Documentation
